prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='NaiveSeasonal', seasonality_champion='ONLY_DWT_rf', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: The true series exhibits consistent downward trend across all folds with significant seasonal amplitude (703.18). Model disagreement is extremely high (rmse_spread_ratio=1.79) and seasonality capture variance is very high (0.91), indicating models fundamentally disagree on how to represent the data patterns. This strongly supports DBA combination which can handle heterogeneous model behaviors better than simple averaging.

raw.pattern_analyst:

  "recommended_weighting_basis": "mixed",

  "cot_narrative": "The true series exhibits consistent downward trend across all folds with significant seasonal amplitude (703.18). Model disagreement is extremely high (rmse_spread_ratio=1.79) and seasonality capture variance is very high (0.91), indicating models fundamentally disagree on how to represent the data patterns. This strongly supports DBA combination which can handle heterogeneous model behaviors better than simple averaging."
}
raw.proposer:
{
  "selected_names": ["dba_combination", "best_per_horizon_by_validation", "inverse_rmse_weights_k5_sh0.35", "topk_mean_per_horizon_k5", "robust_median"],
  "params_overrides": {},
  "score_preset": "rmse_focus",
  "force_debate": false,
  "debate_margin": 0.02,
  "rationale": "n_unique_winners=10 indicates high model disagreement across horizons. relative_spread_mean=2.51 confirms extreme heterogeneity. Pattern analyst recommends dba_combination for heterogeneous behaviors. With n_windows=3 (very few), shrinkage is important - inverse_rmse_weights_k5_sh0.35 provides regularization. best_per_horizon_by_validation captures horizon-specific winners. robust_median adds outlier protection. topk_mean_per_horizon_k5 balances selection diversity. score_preset=rmse_focus aligns with high RMSE spread (best ONLY_FT_catboost 735.6 vs worst CWT_svr 2790.7)."
}

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: The true series exhibits consistent downward trend across all folds with significant seasonal amplitude (703.18). Model disagreement is extremely high (rmse_spread_ratio=1.79) and seasonality capture variance is very high (0.91), indicating models fundamentally disagree on how to represent the data patterns. This strongly supports DBA combination which can handle heterogeneous model behaviors better than simple averaging.
